proposal.title: Cross-Cluster Resource Fusion Protocol
proposal.description: Implement a dynamic resource-sharing layer between DevGroup-Brain and Visual Media Team clusters. Currently each cluster maintains isolated resource pools (workspace, skills, models). A cross-cluster fusion protocol would allow: (1) skill sharing across cluster boundaries without duplication, (2) model load balancing when one cluster hits token limits, (3) shared benchmark results for cross-team optimization. Implementation: create a shared-resource-index in workspace-shared that tracks all skills/models across clusters with usage metrics.

notes: Generated via TPG-GRAO-AutoEvolution cron saturation trigger. Targets cross-cluster optimization gap identified in current grao-state.
